name: Hextile
description: A honeycomb of solid hexagons, each cell re-glazing its colour on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); -webkit-clip-path: polygon(50% 2%, 95% 26%, 95% 74%, 50% 98%, 5% 74%, 5% 26%); clip-path: polygon(50% 2%, 95% 26%, 95% 74%, 50% 98%, 5% 74%, 5% 26%); opacity: @rand(0.8, 1); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
